assumptions: No CockroachDB Cloud organization or cluster exists.
A terminal can install the CockroachDB client.

developer_goal: Create a CockroachDB Cloud trial Standard cluster, create a SQL user, connect with cockroach sql, and run first queries.

first_success.outcome: cockroach sql connects to the Standard cluster and executes SQL successfully.
first_success.observable_signal: The SQL shell accepts statements and returns query results (for example a simple SELECT).

route_selection.surface: CockroachDB Cloud Standard trial + cockroach sql first queries
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: CockroachDB Cloud Standard trial + cockroach sql first queries

candidates.name: CockroachDB Cloud Standard trial + cockroach sql first queries
candidates.reason: Official Quickstart creates a CockroachDB Cloud Standard trial cluster with $400 credits and a SQL user. Connect docs document the CockroachDB Client (cockroach sql) path for first SQL without cloning language samples. Java/Node sample apps are optional peers on the same quickstart.

required_path.action: Create a CockroachDB Cloud account and open Get Started.
Create a Standard cluster (cloud, region, default capacity) without payment while trial is active.
Create a SQL user, Generate & save password, and store the password.
From Connect, select CockroachDB Client, install the client, and copy the cockroach sql connection command.
Run cockroach sql with the provided connection string and enter the SQL password.
Run a first SQL statement and confirm results.

prerequisites.description: CockroachDB Cloud account; first org receives $400 free trial credits.
CockroachDB client binary for cockroach sql.

sources.title: Connect to a CockroachDB Standard Cluster

uncertainties.question: Are all signup and first-success fields for CockroachDB fully enumerated in public docs?
uncertainties.impact: Atomic field counts inside account or billing steps may be incomplete.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Live console fields can differ from documentation screenshots.
